summary: M460 — image-review-v2 List layout now shows full per-pose sub-sprites. List mode in current+characters previously showed only the lone portrait card per enemy/companion/boss (same root cause as the Grouped goblin bug). Added renderListAppearances() which walks appearances-manifest.json the same way Grouped does, but flattens every (appearance × pose) pair into a single flat grid. Prompt + manifest status data are merged in when present; pose + category filters still apply; falls back to the legacy renderGroupedByGroup when appearances haven't fetched yet.
